audit_items.proof_trace: The sole dynamic allocation in cls.c is `kzalloc` at L206 in `nfp_abm_u32_knode_replace`; it is inserted into `alink->dscp_map` and its handle is set (L211) before the only subsequent failure point (`nfp_abm_update_band_map` at L216). All error paths after the allocation reach `nfp_abm_u32_knode_delete`, which iterates `dscp_map` by handle, calls `list_del` + `kfree` (L162-163), correctly freeing the newly allocated entry on every error path. The success path keeps the allocation in the managed list and frees it via `TC_CLSU32_DELETE_KNODE`.
